meaning: adj.不神圣的,不洁净的,邪恶的,不合理的
examples: She wondered how she had got into this unholy mess.
Art shouldn't enter an unholy alliance with business.
I close my eyes slowly, wondering what kind of unholy deal they've struck in the night.
The Hanukkah story is, of course, about reconsecrating what was made unholy by oppressors.
The reform, she said, was "an unholy alliance" between saving money and improving services.
